economic_notes: Council owns 100% of Naha Dehe Development Corporation (business management and investment), 50% of Nahanni Butte General Store Ltd. (operates general store and inn), and 14.3% of Deh Cho Helicopters Regional Limited Partnership (helicopter leasing and charters). Canadian Zinc Access Road and IBA contributions received.
